justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent repeatedly asked the user to specify a time and then to check for any available slots on the same day, leading to redundant turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation was frustrating due to the agent's inability to offer alternative times or days, leading to a repetitive and unproductive exchange.

overall_notes: The agent was unable to book an appointment and did not proactively offer alternative solutions, leading to a poor customer experience.
